title: GraphQL Introspection Response
description: Schema describing the structure of a GraphQL introspection query response. Introspection allows clients to discover the types, fields, directives, and capabilities of a GraphQL schema at runtime.

Schema.description: The root schema object returned by introspection, describing all types, directives, and entry points.

description.description: An optional description of the schema.

queryType.description: The root query type of the schema.

mutationType.description: The root mutation type of the schema, if defined.

subscriptionType.description: The root subscription type of the schema, if defined.

types.description: A list of all types defined in the schema.

directives.description: A list of all directives supported by the schema.

FullType.description: A complete type definition from the GraphQL schema.

fields.description: The fields defined on this type (for OBJECT and INTERFACE types).

inputFields.description: The input fields defined on this type (for INPUT_OBJECT types).

interfaces.description: The interfaces this type implements (for OBJECT types).

enumValues.description: The possible values for this type (for ENUM types).

possibleTypes.description: The types that implement this interface or are part of this union.

specifiedByURL.description: A URL pointing to a specification for this custom scalar type.

Field.description: A field on an Object or Interface type.

args.description: The arguments accepted by this field.

type.description: The return type of this field.

deprecationReason.description: The reason this field was deprecated.

InputValue.description: An argument to a field or directive, or an input field.

name.description: The name of the input value.

description.description: A description of the input value.

type.description: The type of this input value.

defaultValue.description: The default value of this input value, represented as a GraphQL literal string.

isDeprecated.description: Whether this input value is deprecated.

deprecationReason.description: The reason this input value was deprecated.

EnumValue.description: A possible value for an Enum type.

name.description: The name of the enum value.

description.description: A description of the enum value.

isDeprecated.description: Whether this enum value is deprecated.

deprecationReason.description: The reason this enum value was deprecated.

TypeRef.description: A reference to a type, which may be wrapped in List or NonNull modifiers.

kind.description: The kind of the referenced type.

name.description: The name of the referenced type (null for LIST and NON_NULL wrapper types).

ofType.description: The wrapped type for LIST and NON_NULL kinds.

Directive.description: A directive defined in the GraphQL schema.

isRepeatable.description: Whether this directive may be used repeatedly at a single location.

locations.description: The locations where this directive may be used.

args.description: The arguments accepted by this directive.
